offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late financial reports. We automate expense report data extraction instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem: Manual data entry and report generation is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
try_it: Let users try manual data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
